pageContext.name: Fashion Accident Def Beat SuperJanky
pageContext.description: Our favorite synthetic designer Janky finds inspiration everywhere (even in the dumpster behind your local dive bar. Fashion Accident Def Beat is 8 of style that is so wrong it is looped back to being right!  With utterly useless sunglasses, headphones that don't work, and a paddle for smacking Guggimon's butt, this adorable trashbag is ready for any occasion.  With only 1,555 made, you don't want to miss out on your chance to add this designer collectible to your SuperJanky collection!
